rationale: Codex usage limit notification from bot, not actionable feedback.
func.now() vs sa.text('now()') is a weak style nit. func.now() is the established codebase convention used universally throughout models.py.
Added DB_LEASE_PERSISTENCE_PATCH gate for all new activities and 10 focused unit tests covering sync, snapshot, timestamps, and patch-gate safety in commit ed3d0a56.
Gemini review summary comment, not actionable. Specific concerns addressed in individual comments.
Added workflow.patched(DB_LEASE_PERSISTENCE_PATCH) gate on _sync_leases_to_db in _drain_queue. Also added DB sync after _evict_expired_leases and _verify_lease_holders in commit ed3d0a56.
Workflow now includes granted_at from profile.lease_granted_at in sync payloads. Activity parses it via fromisoformat. Commit ed3d0a56.
Replaced per-workflow upsert with snapshot semantics: delete ALL rows for runtime_id then bulk-insert current set. Stale rows eliminated. Commit ed3d0a56.
Activity now preserves original granted_at from workflow payload via fromisoformat, falling back to datetime.now() only when missing. Commit ed3d0a56.

Added 10 new unit tests in TestDBLeaseSync and TestAuthProfileSyncSlotLeasesActivity covering sync payloads, eviction counts, snapshot semantics, timestamp preservation, and patch constant. Commit ed3d0a56.
release_slot now: (1) gates _remove_lease_from_db behind workflow.patched(DB_LEASE_PERSISTENCE_PATCH), (2) always removes DB lease regardless of whether profile exists in memory. Commit ed3d0a56.
_load_leases_from_db in run() is now gated behind workflow.patched(DB_LEASE_PERSISTENCE_PATCH). Old replay paths skip entirely. Commit ed3d0a56.
Copilot review summary comment. All specific concerns addressed in individual line comments above.
